channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Vucevic and White lead Bulls to 127-108 win over Wizards, losers of 12 straight
item.description: Nikola Vucevic scored 19 points and grabbed 12 rebounds as the Chicago Bulls eased to a 127-108 victory over the struggling Washington Wizards on Tuesday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bucks hold Antetokounmpo out of NBA Cup game at Miami with swelling in left knee
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Giannis Antetokounmpo, the league's leading scorer this season, was unexpectedly held out of the Milwaukee Bucks' NBA Cup game at the Miami Heat on Tuesday night with swelling in his left knee. He had been expected to play until about an hour before the game.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College Football Playoff staple Alabama left out of latest bracket projection after upset-filled week
item.description: The Alabama Crimson Tide are in danger of missing out on the College Football Playoff, which no one predicted once it expanded to 12 teams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lewandowski scores 100th Champions League goal. Man City draws Feyenoord but Haaland nets 2
item.description: Robert Lewandowski joined Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi as the only players in Champions League history with 100 or more goals. But Erling Haaland is on a faster pace than anyone by boosting his total to 46 goals at age 24 on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Oklahoma's throwback offensive approach against Alabama gets LSU's attention
item.description: NORMAN, Okla. (AP) — Oklahoma appears to have borrowed from the past to cure its recent offensive ills. The Sooners, best known this century for a passing prowess that has produced four Heisman Trophy-winning quarterbacks, took it back to the 20th century against then-No. 7 Alabama.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rays will play 19 of their first 22 games at home as MLB switches series to avoid summer rain
item.description: Major League Baseball switched a pair of series involving the Tampa Bay Rays to the first two months of the season in an attempt to avoid summer rain at open-air Steinbrenner Field, their temporary home following damage to Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: AP, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Traffic citations against Dolphins' Tyreek Hill dismissed after officers no-show at hearing
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Traffic citations issued to Miami Dolphins star wide receiver Tyreek Hill after a September altercation with police have been dismissed after the charging officers didn't attend a court hearing.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Duke's Maalik Murphy faces internal discipline for obscene gesture, coach says
item.description: Duke head coach Manny Diaz said quarterback Maalik Murphy faces internal discipline for his middle-finger gesture during a win over Virginia Tech.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: County asks Tampa Bay Rays to commit to plans for $1.3 billion ballpark by Sunday
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Rays should declare in writing whether they want to pursue an existing financing plan for a new $1.3 billion ballpark or walk away from the deal, a top county official says.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: PWHL New York Sirens' trajectory points up with addition of rookie star Sarah Fillier and new home
item.description: Soon after the final refrains of Frank Sinatra’s iconic “New York, New York” finished playing over the loudspeakers to signify New York's preseason 5-2 victory over Toronto, Sarah Fillier took a seat at the podium to go over her three-goal outing.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Whittingham uncertain about future at Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This has been the most disappointing and most frustrating season in Kyle Whittingham's 20 years as head coach of the Utah football team. But will Whittingham be back for a 21st season? He has a decision to make in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Seibert misses an extra point late as the Commanders lose their 3rd in a row, 34-26 to the Cowboys
item.description: Austin Seibert choked back tears taking responsibility for missing the extra point that would have tied the score in the final minute. Jeremy Reaves choked back tears blaming himself for a missed assignment that led to a kickoff return touchdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Russell and Hamilton give Mercedes a 1-2 finish in Las Vegas
item.description: An ecstatic George Russell had just won the Formula 1 race Saturday night when he exclaimed in his radio, “Vegas!” He was ready to start celebrating in America's party capital, saying he would skip his flight back to his home in the United Kingdom to make the most of his Las Vegas Grand Prix victory
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Crimson Cliffs pulls off miraculous comeback to win 4A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was simply one of the best, most dramatic games in Utah high school football championship game history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Legion to play in new stadium next year
item.description: Snapdragon Stadium will no longer be the home for the San Diego Legion as the professional rugby team will be heading back to Torero Stadium at the University of San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5
